chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA No. 220 of 2020 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No. 1. 2. For orders on CMA No. 1128/2020. (Exp) 3. For hearing of main case. 4. For orders on CMA No. 119/2020. 22.01.2026 Mr. Muhabbat Hussain Awan, advocate for applicant. This reference is pending since 2020 without any progress. Even notice has not been sought / issued till date. On 03.05.2024, following order was passed:- “Mr. Muhabbatr Hussain Awan, Advocate. Applicant’s counsel requests for time to rephrase the questions of law. At his request time allowed. Adjourned.” Today, learned counsel states that no rephrased questions of law have been submitted and is unable to articulate any reason and justification thereof. It appears that the applicant / department is not interested in proceeding with this matter, therefore, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this order may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Ayaz P.S.
